reasoning: The control IA-5(15) focuses on authenticator management with a specific emphasis on using GSA-approved products and services, particularly around password policies such as minimum length requirements. This is a cloud-specific IAM control related to password management, which does not have a direct equivalent in Kubernetes. Kubernetes does not manage user passwords directly as it relies on external identity providers for authentication, often using OIDC or other federated identity mechanisms. Therefore, password policy enforcement is typically handled outside of Kubernetes.
title: Authenticator Management - Authenticator management | gsa - approved products and services use only general
